steps.prompt:
Weekly Anthropic ecosystem scan. Check these sources for changes since the last scan:

1. **Claude Code**: Run `npm view @anthropic-ai/claude-code versions --json | tail -20` for recent releases. Read meta/research/anthropic-platform-sweep-2026-03-02.md for last known state. Check GitHub anthropics org for new/updated repos.
2. **API & Models**: Search for Anthropic API changelog, new model releases, pricing changes, deprecations.
3. **SDKs**: Check PyPI anthropic + claude-agent-sdk versions. Check npm @anthropic-ai/sdk. Look for new params, breaking changes.
4. **MCP Protocol**: Check github.com/modelcontextprotocol for spec changes, new transports, SDK updates.
5. **Anthropic blog**: Search for recent Anthropic announcements (models, features, partnerships).

Baseline: meta/research/anthropic-tooling-landscape.md + meta/research/anthropic-platform-sweep-2026-03-02.md

Write delta to .claude/plans/vendor-anthropic-delta.md with sections: ## New Releases, ## Feature Changes, ## Deprecations, ## Model Updates, ## Handoff (numbered action items + informational items).

Read .claude/plans/vendor-anthropic-delta.md — focus on ## Handoff.

For each item: (1) does it replace something we built? (compare against hooks in ~/Projects/skills/hooks/, orchestrator, MCP servers) (2) does it enable something new? (3) does it affect our infrastructure?

Update meta/research/anthropic-tooling-landscape.md with new findings (append to relevant sections, add date stamps). If there are significant changes, also update the platform sweep date reference in CLAUDE.md research index.

Write actionable items to .claude/plans/vendor-anthropic-actions.md.
Commit updated research docs with [vendor-scan] prefix.
